log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aven — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aven — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aven — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 18/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aven — Bardic Musician --- HP: 18/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══

REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL! 2 psychic damage. HP: 176/178
